programme.desc: Armed with his trusty copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide of 1913, Michael Portillo explores the former domain of the Habsburg monarchs, beginning in the Hungarian capital Budapest. He then travels to Austria via Bratislava in Slovakia, and in Vienna he immerses himself in pre-First World War decadence. From there he heads to Salzburg, before going on to the Salzkammergut region to visit the emperor's Austrian summer residence at Bad Ischl, where in 1914 Franz Joseph I signed a declaration that changed the course of European history

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Broughton Castle in Oxfordshire, where items brought in for valuation include two 18th-century paintings depicting the house's servants and a Chinese-made silver mug. Plus, the story of a pilot who is believed to have flown Britain's first scheduled air service before becoming one of the first recruits to the Royal Flying Corps

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris crosses Australia from south to north following the original ill-fated route of the 2,000 mile-long Adelaide to Darwin railway. After beginning his journey on a luxury modern train, he transfers to one of the line's surviving steam locomotives before hitting the Outback, where he quickly concludes that a 4x4 is a more practical means of travelling. He passes through ghost towns and explores abandoned railway relics before uncovering why most of the southern section of the line eventually had to be abandoned. At Alice Springs he hitches a ride on a freight train headed for Darwin and reaches his final destination after nearly 24 hours in the cramped cab

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a vicious dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the open American wilderness

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Claustrophobic prison cells that contain a story worthy of international acclaim, and a vast mountainside complex that held the power to change the world

programme.title: Secrets of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Part two of two. A look at Nazi experiments into atomic weapons, examining how close they got to developing a functioning nuclear device before the end of the war

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The story of the siege of Kohima in 1944, when heavily outnumbered British and Indian troops held off Japanese forces until reinforcements could arrive

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Broughton Castle in Oxfordshire, where items brought in for valuation include two 18th-century paintings depicting the house's servants and a Chinese-made silver mug. Plus, the story of a pilot who is believed to have flown Britain's first scheduled air service before becoming one of the first recruits to the Royal Flying Corps

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels through Germany, beginning his journey in Berlin - which at the beginning of the 20th Century was a powerhouse of science and technology. Led by his copy of Bradshaw's Continental Railway Guide of 1913, he heads west via the Harz Mountains to the industrial Ruhr Valley to learn how imperial Germany was ready for war. He then goes south along the tourist trail of the castle-studded Rhine river and ends in the Rheingau to taste the wines of its vineyards

programme.title: Underground Worlds
programme.desc: A look at Sweden's passion for subterranean spaces and how this nation has taken extraordinary precautions to protect itself - by excavating an astounding 65,000 nuclear bunkers. In south-west England, deep in the Mendip Hills of Somerset, lies one of the most spectacular landscapes in the UK, but beneath this breath-taking landscape sits secret caverns and magical rock formations carved out by nature. Plus, how in Romania, nside a 1.2km-thick layer of salt, sits a world underground first

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A power cut on a sweltering summer night gives Victor and Margaret time to reflect on their lives together and look forward, without enthusiasm, to a visit from their elderly neighbours. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Roy Hudd star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is invited to talk about evolution at the Women's Institute, and finds plenty of inspiration when he decides to take up fishing. Meanwhile, Pippa is left shattered after a three-week visit by Patrick's equally stuffy brother. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: After years of frustrated anger and railing against the system, Victor Meldrew breathes his last 'I don't believe it' after falling victim to a hit-and-run driver. At first, it seems as if the shock of his death will take a long time to settle for long-suffering Margaret

programme.title: 'Allo 'Allo!

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Marc and Lucy Champ dream of escaping the rat race for weekends and holidays. However, the pair are torn between east Devon, where Marc grew up, and Comares in Andalucia, Spain. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The culinary contest arrives in Hull as five more diners hope to claim the grand prize of £1,000. The first to host a party this week is 29-year-old welfare team leader Jennie, who decides to honour her home city's fishing history with an under-the-sea themed dinner. However, her guests prove to be a lively bunch, twerking their way through dinner, and throwing in a few seal impressions along the way

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wrestling promoter and novice cook James hosts the second night in Hull, and he hopes to wow his guests with a Mexican-themed party complete with a wrestling match as the evening's entertainment. However, his costume requirements, and his spicy food, may be too much for some of the attendees

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding stationery entrepreneur Katrena hosts the third dinner party in Hull, and hopes to impress her guests with a cruise-ship-themed night featuring a pink strawberry soup starter, a sparkling lemon iceberg dessert and towel-folding entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mum-of-three Natalie hopes that her choice of good quality produce can help her to impress her guests on the fourth night of the competition in Hull, East Yorkshire. However, the evening does not get off to the best start when community manager George wrongly guesses that she is the grandmother of her two-year-old daughter, and entrepreneur Katrena is insulted by one of the host's questions

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the final dinner party in Hull and the turn of community manager George to entertain the guests. Having spent the week heavily criticising everyone else's cooking, the host faces great scrutiny with his menu of simple yet tasty favourites. It remains to be seen whether his egg drop soup and flambeed crepes Suzettes live up to expectations, before the winner of the cash prize is revealed

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Elvis fan Sandra and her husband Desmond seek help in their search for their dream holiday home near Mar Menor's stunning beaches on Spain's Costa Calida. They would ideally like a property with three bedrooms for when their family come to visit. Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Postal workers Linda and Andy from Leicestershire are hanging up their mailbags to relocate to the sun-kissed coast of western Cyprus. Jonnie Irwin has five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, but will any have the couple ready to put in an offer?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

They prefer the rural feel of the villages around Northampton but want to be close to Lloyd's parents - while also being near transport links for London. Helen and Richard fell in love late in life. They are desperate to get out of rented accommodation - but as Kirstie soon realises, it's all about the kitchen for former chef Richard

Meanwhile, Louise and Angela are conflicted when Trinity a five-month-old lurcher puppy shows off both her adorable side and an impressive ability to chew everything from furniture to shoes

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer

Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix challenges two leading chefs to tackle KFC's Zinger Burger and replicate their original top-secret chicken recipe. Tom Aikens from Muse in Belgravia and Alex Bond from Nottingham's Alchemilla have just seven days to perfect their recipes, before cooking them head to head for KFC's big bosses, who will choose a winner. As the chefs take different but equally outlandish approaches in their quests for a perfect replica, comedian Jayde Adams goes behind the scenes of KFC's factories to reveal how the famous products are really made

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: An investigating officer for Bedfordshire Police deals with the case of a man left at the brink of death following a violent incident at home, and realises the victim is a man who came to see her at the station the day before - leaving her wondering if she could have prevented the attack before it happened

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: DCI Adam Gallop believes a man declared missing in 2015 has been murdered - but has so far been unable to locate his body, and the more time passes, the less chance there is of new witnesses or forensic evidence turning up. The police investigation takes officers from an urgent excavation in the woods where the missing man is believeds to have been shot to a journey across Europe in search of clues

programme.desc: The subservient wife of a biker who believes men should be waited on hand and foot swaps lives with a progressive social media influencer, whose husband takes care of the kids

However, midway through the process, the coronavirus hits and communication between the would-be co-parents is forced to shift online

With a budget of £150,000, Ben Hillman lines up five suitable properties for them to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Lisa and Stuart Newby are looking to buy a holiday home, but are torn between locations. Australian-born Lisa, tired of the sun, craves a property on Yorkshire's dinosaur coast, however her husband and their children would prefer something near the beach in Costa Granadina, Spain. Presenters Laura Hamilton and Sara Damergi are on hand to help them decide

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Sara Damergi help retired couple Matthew and Myra McGuigan search for a new home in either Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, or Spain's Costa del Sol. The couple have already sold their UK house and are looking to find another property quickly

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Natasha Conti hosts the first dinner party in Salisbury, Wiltshire, and puts together an evening on the theme of a summer fete, complete with prizes for her fellow competitors. However, as the guests get to know each other, Chris Hiller finds himself in an awkward situation

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farm manager Sophie McConnell hopes that her pig-racing entertainment will impress the guests on her night as host in Salisbury, Wiltshire. She also plans to serve her home-raised cow Levi for the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Anthony Brown-Hovelt hosts the third dinner party in Salisbury, Wiltshire, and his menu includes Uzbekistani food and porridge ice-cream. The former army major dresses as an American sailor, but Natasha Conti does not find the outfit as appealing as she had hoped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Housing support officer Chris Hiller plans an eclectic but affordable menu for his night in Salisbury, Wiltshire, including chicken a l'orange and peppers stuffed with baked beans. However, with the sole focus being on keeping costs low, his efforts might not go down well with the other guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Care worker Jane Arnold hosts the final dinner party in Salisbury, Wiltshire, hoping to impress her guests with food from her local area. However, it is her bedroom revelations that catch the diners' attentions, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: The return of the programme property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a home abroad, beginning with Cath and her daughter Kate looking for a tranquil holiday home along the Costa Almeria in southern Spain. Cath wants enough space for her family to be able to visit, but she also wants somewhere to escape the rat race and find inspiration for her writing. Danni Menzies has five great properties lined up for her £170,000 budget, but will any be the oasis of calm that she has her heart set on?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property expert offers advice to British householders aiming to buy a second home abroad

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge attempt to renovate the orangery with the help of a roofing expert and some pre-loved slate, all the way from Wales. They also discover some unexpected history beneath their feet, and Angel finds two old daybeds in need of upcycling

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: An investigating officer for Bedfordshire Police deals with the case of a man left at the brink of death following a violent incident at home, and realises the victim is a man who came to see her at the station the day before - leaving her wondering if she could have prevented the attack before it happened

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix sets two chefs to the challenge of replicating the Wagon Wheel, a precise combination of mallow, crumbly biscuit and chocolate. Tristan Welch, who cut his teeth with Gary Rhodes, aims to solve the problem with madcap gadgets, while Cyrus Todiwala, one of the most respected Indian chefs in the country, takes a more instinctive approach. They have seven days to perfect their replicas before a cook-off before a panel of Wagon Wheel bosses, who choose the winner. And while they're busy in the kitchen, comedian Jayde Adams goes behind the scenes to reveal how the circular snack is really made

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson returns with the daring dating show - and this time it promises to be even more revealing as two singletons choose a date from six naked people whose bare bodies are revealed from the feet up. First up is 32-year-old wrester Iain from Manchester, who loses his nerve when he's not in the ring. Can the show find hi the perfect partner to pin him down for good? He is followed by 32-year-old graphic designer Leon from south London. Having recently lost weight, this bi-curious graphic designer is looking for the perfect partner - female or his first male - to share his new body

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Gallery owner Elinor and fitness entrepreneur Born set themselves the task of creating Britain's first hypoallergenic house in a leafy back garden plot in south-west London. Driven by the need to alleviate their two young sons' life-threatening allergies, their new part-submerged, shed-inspired home, will be constructed using low toxin materials and deploy cutting-edge filtration systems to clean the air they breathe. Will their innovative new house deliver the benefits Elinor and Born are hoping for?

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a father and son planning to convert an oil rig escape boat into a floating home, and an inventor working on a perfectly spherical house. The Spanish tour concludes with a visit to a studio apartment by the sea with rotating internal walls, and the team's expandable camper goes on its maiden voyage at the grand opening on Hastings Pier

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Nisha Katona samples a range of dishes in Viterbo, a hilltop city with a papal history in Lazio. She tastes freshwater lake fish from the largest volcanic crater lake in Europe and tries acquacotta viterbese - a traditional soup of local vegetables, herbs and a poached egg. The chef and restaurateur also visits a salami emporium where she savours susianella di Viterbo - a local delicacy of liver and offal sausage - and inspired by her discoveries, cooks poached fish and vegetables with hazelnut butter

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Royal Oak in the Peak District, run by Kadir Ustun, is the week's third location, but mould in their respective bathrooms puts off two sets of guests straight away

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A Londoner gets a reality check as she prepares to open a bar in the south of France, while a Kent couple sink all their savings into a holiday business in Tarn et Garonne

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Elvis fan Sandra and her husband Desmond seek help in their search for their dream holiday home near Mar Menor's stunning beaches on Spain's Costa Calida. They would ideally like a property with three bedrooms for when their family come to visit. Danni Menzies has five options for their £150,000 budget, but whether the couple will be impressed enough to put in an offer remains to be seen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Property experts meet fitness fanatics Mike Bennett and Andree Warbrick who cannot decide between buying a property on southern Spain's Costa Tropical or opting for a bigger house in the Cotswolds

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Sara Damergi help best friends Mary-Rose Cross and Jane Murison make a big decision. They want to have an adventure and move either to Oban in Scotland or Lake Vinuela in Andalucia, southern Spain

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Virginia Houslin opens the contest in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, and her hopes for some flirtatious fun are boosted by the arrival of her first guest, wedding singer Richard Wood. However the cheeky host faces a battle to win over the taste buds of her other diners as she tries to stake her claim for the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Business development manager Iyesha Atkins hosts the second dinner party in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, hoping her sophisticated event will win her the £1,000 prize. However, the evening does not go to plan when Virginia finds fault with Iyesha's main course, and the two women fall out following a discussion about religion

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Wedding singer and confident cook Richard Wood hosts the third dinner party in Huddersfield. With steak on the menu, he opts not to listen to his guests' preferences and instead cooks and serves them his own way. However, with the starter a disaster and the rift between mum-of-three Virginia and ladette Iyesha deepening, Richard believes the only solution to save his night is for him to sing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Tommy Mack hosts the fourth dinner-party challenge from Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, and tries to woo his guests with a Hollywood silent movie-themed evening, which includes a selection of mystery dishes and his very own style of rapping

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kim Connor hosts the final party in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, hoping her American diner-themed menu will delight her guests. Sweating over a hot stove is not what the glamorous hairdresser is used to, and she relies on helpful advice from her mother. The food fails to appeal to everyone's tastes, but Kim's after-dinner entertainment seems to revive her flagging chances of success

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Pub landlady Alison seeks a home on the Costa Dorada in Spain. Famous for its golden beaches, the region has stunning river valleys and traditional hilltop villages, where Alison would love to buy a smallholding and keep chickens. With five options up his sleeve, Jonnie Irwin helps Alison and her friend Theresa, who's come along for support, find the perfect property for her £70,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maggie and Alistair from Edinburgh dream of buying a holiday home on the southern coast of Gran Canari, famous for its famous white sandy beaches. Jasmine Harman shows Maggie and Alistair five potential properties, but will any of them prove to be their dream holiday home?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Dentist Michelle Naik and retired entrepreneur Marshal Sutherland from Sheffield have fallen in love with the Caribbean island of Aruba. The couple have now decided it's the perfect place to find an island retreat. With a budget of £130,000 and the help of Scarlette Douglas, they hope to find a holiday home that could one day become a permanent retirement location

programme.title: The Royal House of Windsor
programme.desc: This episode reveals how Prince Philip was frustrated by having to give up his beloved naval career in exchange for a lifetime of trailing after his wife - but channelled his energy into becoming the Windsors' most radical moderniser. When Elizabeth is catapulted on to the throne, her husband wants to assert his rights by having his children bear his surname of Mountbatten. But the young and inexperienced Queen faces formidable opposition from her mother, grandmother and the most powerful man in the land, the PM Sir Winston Churchill. They want the Royal Family to retain the very English name 'Windsor', and the Queen gives in. Philip deals with this blow by launching a series of radical modernisation projects: overhauling the management of Buckingham Palace and refitting the Royal Yacht. But he's thwarted at every turn by the palace old guard who distrust him and dislike change. In 1956, the Prince responds by setting off alone on a four-month world cruise, giving rise to rumours of a

programme.title: The Real Prince Philip: A Royal Officer
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the Duke of Edinburgh's life and career, emphasising the role his military experiences played in his later achievements, and how that his ethos of 'service' and 'duty' was forged during his impressive naval career

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Twenty-seven-year-old salesman James is paired with 31-year-old Serena, who is looking for a reformed bad boy after a history of dating disasters. programme.desc: Actor John Lithgow, comedian Jon Richardson, Paralympian Hannah Cockroft, and funnyman Russell Brand take on three challenges in the baking show. programme.desc: Rich vlogger Callum moves in with Luke, a father-of-two who lives on the breadline in Deal, Kent. Before long, Callum is looking after the kids and doing the chores, and comes to a distressing realisation about the daily struggles of Luke's life

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After moving abroad for work, a landlord discovers that his tenants have left him over £20,000 behind with his mortgage, and the developers of an old swimming pool in Bristol discover that they are liable for the electricity that the building's squatters have been using

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase £5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A driver reverses his car into Bob's pursuing police vehicle three times before speeding down an off-road track, while handler Duncan and his trusty dog Tia are called in to search a house with an alarm that has been going off all night

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A car thief in Wakefield rams his way out of a petrol station before leading Jaffa, Chris and the rest of the team on a high-speed and highly dangerous pursuit. Big H and Stef can't believe their luck when two drug dealers park up right in front their unmarked car, while Wayne and Tom face some fighting talk from a 17-year-old, and a late-night collision with a Mini highlights the risks officers face on the road

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers pursue an out-of-control car that hurtles wildly over a major junction and crashes between two trees. When it stops, the driver and passenger, who are miraculously unharmed, turn out to be 12. Police officers in West Yorkshire investigate a rise in cloned cars, a drunken driver has a tall story to tell, and an armed response vehicle pursues a speeding car across Huddersfield

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry try to recover more than £6,000 owed in nursery fees in Warwickshire, while Gary and Cona head to West Sussex, chasing £11,000 owed by a businessman who has defaulted on a previous plan, and have no option but to break into the property. The pair also head down to the south coast of England, seeking more than £3,500 owed for an unpaid loan

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Karl's actions have left Olivia unconscious, and he desperately tries to explain himself. Yashvi throws her parents an anniversary celebration, but Dipi drops a bombshell

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis examines how CCTV means wrongdoers can no longer hide in a crowd, looking at its use in convicting people involved in the August 2011 riots across England

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Paul Walker and Victoria Maude leave their five-bedroom house in Arun Valley, West Sussex behind to trade places with Steve and Naz Edney, who live in a three-bedroom house in a Fareham, Hampshire, and are in the country's poorest 10 per cent. They swap homes, budgets and lives for seven days as they see what it is like at the other end of the economic spectrum

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of more dog owners at their wits' end dealing with their four-legged friends. He helps a woman teach a determined Doberman to obey not just her but her elderly parents as well, reunites two dachshunds who have gone from the best of friends to the worst of enemies, and tries to calm the ardour of a hairdresser's French bulldog

programme.title: The Town the Gypsies Took Over
programme.desc: Documentary exploring Britain's oldest and most exclusive Gypsy gathering, the Appleby Horse Fair in Cumbria, which is attended by more than 10,000 travellers. The programme explores how new police restrictions are impacting on the festival's traditions, as well as the disruption caused by torrential rain, including a nearby river rising to a dangerous level. Plus, local business owners share their thoughts on the event. While some stand to make a profit from the visitors, others find the size of the fair overwhelming

programme.title: And Proud
programme.desc: Documentary about petty thieves making a living by picking pockets and snatching valuables in the street, including 34-year-old Rob Nightingale, who has been active for the past five years and claims he has stolen valuables worth around £100,000 in the space of 12 months. The film also shows Romanian gangs operating in Liverpool and London and learns the tricks of their trade, as well as following the money back to their home country to discover what the ill-gotten gains are spent on

programme.title: Fred & Rose West: 5 Clues That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: The infamous crimes of Fred and Rose West, who carried out a series of murders at their home on Cromwell Street, Gloucester between 1967 and 1987. Deputy senior investigating officer Terry Moore reveals the details of the police work that resulted in their arrests and ultimately the conviction of Rose West, with Fred committing suicide while on remand in 1995

programme.title: Dirty John
programme.desc: Debra has a seemingly perfect life, but she is lacking love. When she meets the handsome John Meehan, could things be looking up?

programme.title: 22 Kids & Counting
programme.desc: The Radford children return to education after months off due to the pandemic, and with 11-year-old Max starting at a new high school his parents anxiously wait to see how his first day went. Noel adopts a radical approach to device addiction and takes the older kids on an adventure, while Sue gets some much-needed quiet time at home with the little ones

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Midlands-based pest exterminators Chris and Mark take on some elusive mice causing havoc in an unexpected location, while in Buckinghamshire, a lorry load of potentially hazardous waste is dumped by the side of a main road, and boss David suspects it could be linked to organised crime

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. In Hammersmith, west London, camera operators help police as they try to enforce a drinking ban on a local park and spot a group whose members may be about to break into a shop

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Internet entrepreneur Martin and his partner in grime Glenn hear about a huge fly-tipping operation blighting a remote Hampshire beauty spot, and raise a small army of volunteers who roll up their sleeves to sort it themselves. Meanwhile, the UK's network of motorways and A-roads rely upon a system of lay-bys to help keep drivers safe, but these safe pull-in zones also attract an unsightly collection of filthy behaviour, and it falls to Huntingdon lay-by warriors Clive and Steve to take on the speeding traffic, atrocious weather, drunk drivers - and those people who confuse lay-bys with lavatories

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Essex-based high-speed police interception unit pursues a gang of would-be jewellery thieves, while a burglar leads the team on a car chase

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Air Support Unit's helicopter is called into action late at night to look for an armed robber. On the ground, police pursue an escaped prisoner driving a stolen car down the wrong side of a dual carriageway and a van being driven erratically through the streets of Essex

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gary and Paul visit Kent to recover £2,500 owed by a publican to a utilities supplier - only to find themselves in the middle of a family at war. Stewart and Elmor deal with a sensitive case in Liverpool, as they repossess a property where the tenant has failed to pay any rent for almost a year

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera

programme.desc: Two people arrive after jumping from an upstairs window during a house fire and consultant Andy must manage their care and ensure that Resus runs smoothly as other serious cases arrive. programme.desc: A man is rushed in with horrific head and neck wounds after being attacked with a machete, and as the medics fight to stabilise him, his blood pressure drops and they need to take urgent action. programme.desc: A wealthy 21-year-old with a busy social life moves in with a single mother from Orpington and her three children. She learns an important lesson in the need to become independent from her parents - and their money

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: In Northumbria, a specialist sewage blockage team tackle a series of weather-induced problems, including a manhole spouting wet wipes, a drain blocked by plastic bottles and a poo 'sausage' threatening to send raw sewage back into people's homes. Meanwhile, in Worcestershire, the food inspectors are out in force, conducting a second round of surprise visits on two restaurants that did not quite make the mark last time. With more than 500 deaths a year from food poisoning and more than 7,000 food establishments failing basic hygiene standards annually, the two eateries have their work cut out to satisfy the inspectors

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Kate faces trouble from unruly tenants, who became anti-social, and are now trying to sue her for serving them an eviction notice. Dhiren relates how the existing tenant of a house he bought stopped paying rent as soon as he took ownership, and Tim explains how a health scare left him seeking to sell his property - but a standing occupant refused to leave

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Claire and Simon seek eviction specialist Chris's help to evict a man claiming to be renting their old family home. Meanwhile, Hamza hopes to get his council flat back after he tried to help a neighbour's friend by letting them stay for a week, but ended up being shut out when they refused to leave. Plus, a man is almost £30,000 in debt and in danger of repossession after his tenants stopped paying the rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Brian and Graham have been warned to expect trouble as they evict some tenants from a south London flat, one of whom has a reputation for violence. Everything goes smoothly until the enforcement agents make a shocking discovery in a child's bedroom. Paul and Steve head to Slough to collect wages owed to a freelance worker, but the debtor is less than happy to find the high-court enforcement officers on his doorstep and things get physical

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A police chase ends with the driver of a stolen Lexus crashing the luxury motor, and the police interception unit deals with an Essex girl whose car is 'too sexy' for the law. Elsewhere, a high-speed pursuit results in a head-on collision with one of the team's vehicles

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team discovers the garage hideout of a gang of burglars in a country lane, and pursues a BMW driver who endangers his life by running across four lanes of a dual carriageway to escape with a suspicious package. The police interceptors also apprehend a mother driving with no tax, insurance or MOT, who turns out never to have passed her driving test

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers follow a stolen BMW fitted with a tracking device as it heads for a cargo ship, while a drunk driver is pursued through Epping Forest. Documentary series profiling the work of a high-speed police interception unit in Essex

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Sheriff Paul Bohill tackles the case of a small debt owed by ex-footballer Neil 'Razor' Ruddock to a kennel owner, before being forced to evict a school dinner lady in south London. Meanwhile, in the north of England enforcement agent Stewart MacCracken heads out with trainee Iain Taylor to confront a Yorkshire builder they need to get payment from at his home, while a reptile shop owner hit by online competitors urgently needs to pay a debt for the feed company he relies on to keep his animals alive

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Enforcement officers are faced with the difficult job of evicting a woman with two children - a task that takes a turn for the worse when her ex-partner makes an appearance. In Liverpool, locals threaten a riot over an unpaid debt at a computer shop, while two agents come across an extremely rare car in the course of their duties

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Emmett wants to move back in with Aaron and David when his aunt Linda asks if he would like to go back to New Zealand. Chloe is starting to fall for Nicolette

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: When Chloe and Ryder share a kiss, drama ensues and everyone gets dragged into it. Dean and Amber struggle to co-parent without being romantically involved

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The secret world of Iceland's food development, sourcing, manufacturing and distribution, through exclusive access to the outlets and suppliers. In Thornton Cleveleys, just north of Blackpool, bargain-hunting customers are queuing overnight to be first in line to get some cheap food and the chance to win vouchers to spend at the opening of a brand new store

programme.title: Bargain Brits on Benefits
programme.desc: Cameras follow folks claiming benefits whose clever ideas and savvy schemes save them a small fortune

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan clean up a semi-detached house in Bedford belonging to a woman with rheumatoid arthritis, which has left her with extremely restricted mobility

programme.title: 22 Kids & Counting
programme.desc: Noel and Sue's 18-year-old daughter Millie announces her pregnancy, and sister Chloe is put in charge of organising the baby shower, but a cake crisis threatens to ruin everything. In true Radford style, Noel saves the day, and three generations of Radford women gather to celebrate the imminent arrival of Noel and Sue's sixth grandchild

programme.title: Gypsy Kids: Our Secret World
programme.desc: In Birmingham, tensions are running high for nine-year-old Margaret and her cousins, who are being evicted by bailiffs every seven days. Meanwhile, 14-year-old Jamsey is dreaming of a place to call home, but is currently living on a piece of land that was previously a dumping ground

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Students who have turned to the sex industry to make ends meet, including Ella, who is both a law and criminology graduate and an award-winning porn star, and Akonne, who is now in his second year of a sports science degree, and has been stripping for audiences since he was 20

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: Documentary following Britons living the high life on a low budget in Blackpool, one of the country's favourite resorts, from holiday-makers to those who have made the Lancashire town their home. Entertainer Simon Green - aka Betty Legs Diamond - talks about his life as a drag queen, and Scottish sisters Agnes and Margaret get more than they bargained for as part of their holiday package. Meanwhile, Jamie Diggins, who works as an estate agent for caravans, takes delivery of a static home that costs an amazing £280,000

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A 74-year-old with breathing difficulties is rushed into Barnsley Hospital, and registrar Dr Nick Mani considers placing the patient in a medically-induced coma to stabilise him. Junior doctor Ashleigh Trimble assesses 70-year-old Dave, whose daughter Sarah fears her dad's confusion and loss of appetite are masking a more serious condition

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Emmett wants to move back in with Aaron and David when his aunt Linda asks if he would like to go back to New Zealand. Chloe is starting to fall for Nicolette

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: When Chloe and Ryder share a kiss, drama ensues and everyone gets dragged into it. Dean and Amber struggle to co-parent without being romantically involved

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason agrees to help Chunk's daughter, Anna, when her journalism professor, Chloe is sued by a dating app developer for trying to steal data for an expose she's writing about sexual assault cover-ups. However, the stakes are raised when the company alleges that she actually stole proprietary information and intended to sell it to a competitor. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green grow frustrated with their fruitless investigation of an elderly woman's murder and come to blows over suggestions that one of them is too old for the case. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is found bludgeoned into a coma, the apparent victim of date-rape. Briscoe and Green track down an employee in the state controller's office who had been stalking her, and find the drug Demerol in his car. Guest starring Sebastian Roche

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck ad executive becomes a murder suspect when his wife and son are killed during a night he claims to have spent drinking. Ellen Pompeo (Grey's Anatomy) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the bombing of a helicopter that left all six passengers dead. The trail leads to the widow of one of the victims, and her financial dealings with an enigmatic couple. However, as the net closes, more than one motive emerges for the killings. Real-life husband and wife Michael McKean and Annette O'Toole guest star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teacher's body is found in the boot of her car. Suspicions that she was having an affair are soon confirmed, but the case takes a sinister turn when the trail leads to her husband and fanatical father-in-law. Jerry Orbach stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A investigation into multiple homicides at a clothes shop leads to the arrest of a schizophrenic man, and his decision to represent himself in court provides McCoy with a formidable opponent

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a deadly car explosion in DC that seems to be connected to Special Agent Nick Torres's disappearance six months earlier while on a deep-cover operation in Argentina

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: NCIS detectives uncover a bomb plot and a long-running theft ring while investigating a death at a Quantico reunion. Elsewhere, Torres and Quinn adjust to life on Gibbs' team, but find new seating arrangements in the squad room just one of the things causing tension to mount. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An old family friend from the army beseeches Gibbs to join him on a road trip to search for a missing military ID bracelet. A Navy lieutenant in NCIS protective custody is poisoned by an infamous drug dealer. Dabney Coleman guests stars, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy businessman's children in his apartment. At first the victims' stepmother seems the most likely culprit, but the team is also suspicious of two nannies with ties to the grieving family. Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing woman leads Goren and Eames to a political activist's apartment, where they find deadly materials including rat poison - a known bomb-making ingredient. After receiving a chilling video message and questioning a suspect, the detectives soon realise a forthcoming Veteran's Day parade is being targeted

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case against alleged serial rapist John Curtis is put in jeopardy when he is freed on bail after a witness is declared unreliable. A determined Danville takes another look at the evidence, but when one of the apparent victims is killed, she uncovers a conspiracy to get Curtis convicted - and discovers a possible connection to Senator Matthews. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates when a cage fighter's driving licence is found next to what is assumed to be his charred remains. His wife reveals he was being stalked, but when Jo and Adam find the man who had been harassing him he swears he was not involved. A forensic examination of the corpse suggests the victim may have been another person entirely, and the arrival at the precinct of a confused man covered in blood, petrol and traces of asbestos further complicates the case

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Juliette regains the last of her memories and wants to get back together with Nick, whose latest case uncovers a plot to create an army of zombies. Adalind makes a dangerous bargain with Stefania to regain her supernatural powers - in exchange for her unborn child

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Juliette's romantic reunion is cut short by a horde of zombies Renard and Baron Samedi have unleashed, while Frau Pech casts a spell on Adalind

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

However, the case is complicated when Assistant US Attorney Sylvia Banner (Dana Delany) has the DEA arrest her for possession with intent to distribute

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates a deadly car explosion in DC that seems to be connected to Special Agent Nick Torres's disappearance six months earlier while on a deep-cover operation in Argentina

programme.title: NCIS

Elsewhere, Torres and Quinn adjust to life on Gibbs' team, but find new seating arrangements in the squad room just one of the things causing tension to mount. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an insurance salesman who sold bogus policies to European Jews during the Second World War and soon discover the victim possessed valuable information about specific policy numbers that could provide a link to the culprit. Jerry Reach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Green and Briscoe search for a gigolo suspected of killing an elderly rich woman and stealing a large amount of her jewellery, but as investigations progress, it becomes clear there is more to the murder than meets the eye. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An attorney is killed shortly after deciding to file a sexual harrassment claim against his employer, and when Briscoe and Curtis investigate further, they discover both the alleged harasser and his wife have excellent motives for murder

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a wealthy art patron is found murdered and her body mutilated, the team's inquiries lead to failed painter Larry Brunig, who objected to the obscene nature of the art supported and promoted by the victim - and a probe into his past reveals a violent history

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of a prostitute's body behind a rubbish bin. As inquiries get under way, they uncover a seedy case involving the shipping of illegal immigrants, police corruption and virtual sex

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baby is found dead in his cot, and reports indicate he was poisoned. All the evidence pins the blame on a British au pair employed by the parents, but she claims the infant's death was a result of the mother's negligence. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When the NCIS team investigates a marine sergeant's fall to her death from a building, her doctor, Dr Grace Confalone, confides in Gibbs urging him to consider this a murder investigation. Meanwhile, Torres searches for a place to live

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After the body of a navy lieutenant is discovered aboard a destroyer during a 'tiger cruise', a time when civilian guests are allowed to spend the night on the ship, Gibbs, Quinn and Palmer travel out to sea to investigate. Meanwhile, McGee contemplates the perfect proposal for Delilah Fielding

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: When a missing MI6 Officer is linked to a murdered petty officer, Gibbs sends Quinn and Bishop to Philadelphia to work with MI6 Officer Clayton Reeves. Meanwhile, Quinn painfully recounts the NCIS case that made her leave field work

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A girl takes desperate measures to avenge the years of abuse and neglect inflicted upon her by her psychotherapist parents. The events that follow culminate in tragedy for a man caught up in their promiscuity, mind games and competitiveness. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the contract killing of a businessman's wife. Evidence at the scene points to two assailants, one of whom was wearing a bandage, and the victim's mother-in-law becomes the chief suspect. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A man admits to killing his father and half-brother, but Goren and Eames discover he had been heavily influenced by a self-improvement guru. The detectives are forced to take an unorthodox approach to discover whether the chief suspect was coerced into carrying out the murders

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a wealthy estate agent during a robbery at his home. Lindsay and Flack are led to one of the suspects when they examine a package used to lure the victim's wife into opening the front door to the assailants. However, it becomes clear he is not responsible for the crime, and the evidence reveals there were many people in the victim's life with reasons to want him dead

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is murdered while taking the guise of an FBI agent during a role-playing game, and her fellow participant, the son of a hedge fund billionaire, is kidnapped and held to ransom. His father explains the pair were estranged and he refuses to pay the abductors, and a bungled sting coupled with a lack of information about those responsible means Mac must turn to the forensic evidence to bring the man back alive. Crime drama, guest starring Megan Dodds (Not Going Out)

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick is seemingly killed by Baron Samedi, and his friends brave the zombie outbreak across Portland to recover his body. However, the occult detective soon rises from the grave. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Adalind continues her quest to regain her powers. Monroe, Hank, Rosalee and Juliette track down Nick, but find he seems trapped in a partly zombified state. Meanwhile, Captain Renard does his best to clean up the zombie fallout both domestic and international

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces across the country to reveal how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions against shoplifters. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

Bull hopes they can convince the jury that Jim has redeemed himself for his past misdeeds by living an upstanding life for years

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After the body of a navy lieutenant is discovered aboard a destroyer during a 'tiger cruise', a time when civilian guests are allowed to spend the night on the ship, Gibbs, Quinn and Palmer travel out to sea to investigate. programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Sanitation workers find the body of a teenage boy, and the investigation leads to a school bully who displays an enthusiastic interest in martial arts. As the case progresses, the team discovers the youngster's father had bought the murder weapon, and attempts a risky gamble to bring the killer to justice

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is found strangled, leading Green and Briscoe to suspect a homeless man of the murder. Taken into custody, he refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering himself incapable of standing trial for murder. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hard-partying model, with a cocaine habit goes missing, and when the team investigates, a basketball player, a limo driver and a nightclub owner are suspected of orchestrating her disappearance

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the strangulation of a college graduate who moonlighted as a stripper to pay off her fees, and learn that the girl's death is linked to insider trading involving a former porn star and her mentor. Jerry Orbach stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The relatives of a wealthy woman found in a coma come under suspicion when the team investigates her subsequent death. It later transpires she was suffering from a degenerative disease, and the theory of a possible mercy killing crumbles when the family's affairs, both financial and sexual, come to light. David Dukes guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baby is found dead in his cot, and reports indicate he was poisoned. All the evidence pins the blame on a British au pair employed by the parents, but she claims the infant's death was a result of the mother's negligence. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is kidnapped, but manages to escape her captor. The NCIS team members investigate and soon discover a possible connection to her missing husband. Meanwhile, Abby knits both Quinn and Torres personalised 'gifts'

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Torres boldly breaks protocol when he learns a witness in an NCIS case is wanted by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Meanwhile, Bishop and McGee hope to sublet Tony's apartment - by wooing his father, landlord Tony DiNozzo Sr. Robert Wagner guest stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ellie questions her previous work at the NSA after she is sent to Gitmo to gather evidence for a Navy chaplain murder case. Meanwhile, Bishop's brothers visit for the Thanksgiving holiday and pester her co-workers to find out who she is dating

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: Syd and McKenna's hunt for Gabriel Knox intensifies as they let the Bens in on their search for the elusive Arlo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A troubled airport baggage supervisor is found murdered, prompting Goren and Eames to interrogate her colleagues about their reasons for distrusting her. The policemen finally uncover evidence of an operation that could well have been enough reason to silence the victim. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when the owner of one of the city's most exclusive hotels is found dead from a fatal injection of Botox, and suspicion falls on her unstable daughter, who resented her mother's interference in her love life. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigates when a man is found dead at the bottom of a flight of steps after fleeing from an argument, but his injuries make it hard to determine exactly how he died. In a seemingly unrelated incident a jogger is strangled and pinned to a tree by an arrow, but an unusual variety of chewing gum links the two crimes. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A crime-scene lab technician is murdered in a manner remarkably similar to how one of her predecessors died in 1957, and someone anonymously texts pictures of the victim to Mac and Jo. The investigators discover the woman had been out drinking with two colleagues on the night of her death and receive some help from the retired detective who investigated the original case. Guest starring Lee Majors (The Six Million Dollar Man) and Spencer Grammer (Greek)

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate a series of mysterious deaths in which people simply exploded, and discover it may be the consequence of a centuries-long feud. Elsewhere, Monroe and Rosalee talk about moving their relationship a stage further. David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby star

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When Nick and Hank investigate a drowning death with mysterious marks on the victim's ankles, they happen upon a group of water-bound Wesen. programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a flat in Port Glasgow and terraced houses in Derbyshire and Kent. They then find out what they were sold for at auction, and talk to the buyers about their plans for the properties

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore three properties about to be auctioned, including a flat in Chelsea, central London, and terraced houses in Dover, Kent, and Sandbach in Cheshire. After the sales the presenters talk to the new owners about their plans for their purchases, and then review their progress a few months later

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon hunt for items of interest in the West Country, with Phil quizzing a local fisherman, and Catherine changing her strategy

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell has a ride on a replica steam vehicle as he and Catherine Southon travel along the Cornish coastline in search of more antique bargains

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: At the recycling centre in Woking, upcycling aficionado EJ Osborne unearths three hidden gems - an unwanted windbreaker, some old workshop cast-offs and a child's chair

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps house hunters find their dream homes in popular winter sun destinations. Potential buyers explore stunning Torrevieja on Costa Blanca, Spain

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Officers are alerted to a Siberian tiger cooped up in a trailer, and deal with a house containing more than 30 cats living together in poor conditions. The police investigate a case of horse neglect and examine sick and injured poodles

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Chief investigator Jim Boller and his team are given an unusual and potentially hazardous task - moving four black bears from a roadside zoo to their secure shelter

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Tia faces a challenge rescuing a dog tied up in an empty house, and Tania tries rehoming an unusual resident, only for a health scare to jeopardise the adoption

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: A dog's chance of being homed is put at risk when a tumour is found. Tia faces a tough decision when an aggressive dog becomes a danger to her staff

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: At the recycling centre in Woking, upcycling aficionado EJ Osborne unearths three hidden gems - an unwanted windbreaker, some old workshop cast-offs and a child's chair

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Catherine Southon and Paul Laidlaw embark on the last leg of their road trip, planning on shopping in Perthshire and Angus. As things stand it is two auctions each, so both need to win the final decisive battle in Aberdeen

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hanson and Margie Cooper embark on a new road trip, setting off from Melton Mowbray and passing through Coventry and Lichfield as they travel to an auction in Nottingham

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus is in Newcastle to clear out a home full of books, and takes an interest in a Bechstein piano, a scary vase and a silver loving cup

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Forty-year-old mother of three Samantha Whyte turns to the programme for help as she searches for the Swiss father she has never met, having spent years dreaming about it. Raised by her single mother in Glasgow, Scotland, she was told the story of her parents' whirlwind romance in Zurich, and became desperate to know the man behind the myth. Meanwhile, Vanda James looks to put an end to a secret that has haunted her family for more than 50 years. When she was a child, a new-born baby was taken away at a few days old, and her mother never spoke about it. She discovered the baby was her brother and had been adopted, but her mother died before she had the courage to ask her about him

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown with Nick Groff
programme.desc: Ghost hunters Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman seek answers on who is haunting the infamous Kreischer Mansion, Staten Island, New York. Legend states that during the late 1800s several seances were conducted inside the mansion

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The team search a Romanian castle where Dracula was said to rule and investigate the happenings in a place that locals refer to as the 'Bermuda Triangle of Transylvania'

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team head to Abbey House Museum in Kirkstall, West Yorkshire. It soon becomes apparent this venue boasts a particularly aggressive poltergeist

programme.title: Merlin

programme.title: Merlin

Fantasy drama, guest starring Miriam Margolyes, with Colin Morgan and Bradley James

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Gwen is forced to choose between saving the life of Arthur and her estranged brother Elyan, with one of them set to die at the hands of Cenred. She tries desperately to find a way out, but with Morgana and Morgause doing everything they can to thwart her efforts, the outcome looks bleak. Starring Angel Coulby and Emilia Fox

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Arthur embarks on a quest to prove himself a worthy heir to the throne of Camelot by retrieving the Golden Trident from the Fisher King. However, Morgana spots an opportunity to attack the prince outside the safety of the citadel, and plays a trick that leaves him in mortal peril. Starring Colin Morgan, Bradley James and Katie McGrath, with Donald Sumpter (Being Human)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Jim Brass takes time off from his regular duties to visit his daughter in Hollywood and help investigate the disappearance of her friend, a mystery the police are strangely reluctant to look into. Inquiries lead him to the abandoned car she was last seen in, and he subsequently uncovers a connection between the vehicle and a mayoral candidate. Detective drama, starring Paul Guilfoyle and Gary Dourdan

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of Vietnam Prisoners of War Ernie Brace and John McCain and the friendship they formed by tapping code through the cell walls of Hanoi Hilton prison in the late 1960s. The pair did not meet face to face until an event at the White House in 1973. Brace was the longest-held American civilian prisoner, detained for nearly eight years. McCain would go on to become a US senator and contest the Republican nomination for president against George W Bush

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Following Australia's traffic enforcers as they deal with high-speed chases, defiant hooligans and explosive crashes

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A runaway driver hits dangerously high speeds as he flees from police, and a motorcyclist goes head first through a car window

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls go to Australia to release a new single - but someone steals a recording of all their latest songs with the intention of selling it to their rivals

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band have a concert the same day Kim is competing in a sporting event, but an inventor offers to use his time machine to let her be in two places at once

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: UBOS
programme.desc: Magical animation following the adventures of three friends who discover a mysterious underworld at their boarding school

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A monster plots to ruin the winter festival by stealing all the children's presents

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Faxe finds a wolf cub in the forest, but its mother thinks he is a threat to her child and goes on the warpath

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: Prince Philip: An Extraordinary Life
programme.desc: A powerful portrait of a man who has often been the subject of conflicting opinions yet was regarded as the most popular royal amongst Palace staff

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Spring and Port Wine (1970)
programme.desc: A tyrannically strict Lancashire father brings about the downfall of his family by forcing his daughter to eat a meal against her will. Drama, starring James Mason, Diana Coupland, Susan George and Rodney Bewes

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist talks to Primal Scream singer Bobby Gillespie, who discusses his time in the Jesus and Mary Chain and the records that fuelled his love of music

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Matt Allwright and Chris Hollins follow the work of food inspectors, who protect the public from unhygienic restaurants and potentially harmful foodstuffs

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams travels to the Wiltshire village home of Jim Stoodley, who at the age of 14 stole a US aircraft and took to the air with the intention of killing Adolf Hitler - earning himself a place in the Guinness Book of Records as the youngest pilot in history

programme.title: Underworld at War
programme.desc: Peter Williams investigates the ration-book fraudsters and coupon fiddlers spawned by the restrictions of the Second World War, and looks at the career of gangster Frankie Fraser, for whom the war provided an opportunity to get rich quick

programme.title: IBA Unlicensed Legends
programme.desc: Big characters. Great fights. Never seen before amazing action from the ring. Bouts from IBA Boxing's most notorious fighters bring their best game for these high-octane events

programme.title: Dying of the Light (2014)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is diagnosed with a degenerative condition that results in him being forced to retire from the world of intelligence. When he receives word that a terrorist who once tortured him has resurfaced, he goes rogue and sets out to assassinate the man while he is still able. Thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Anton Yelchin and Irene Jacob

programme.title: Felicity (1978)
programme.desc: A teenager in a remote Catholic girls' school seeks solace from her repressive life in reading erotic novels and having a secret love affair with one of her classmates. A trip to Hong Kong organised by her parents opens her eyes to more experiences - both good and bad. Australian drama, starring Glory Annen and Jody Hanson

programme.title: Rockets in the Dunes (1960)
programme.desc: A Devon beach is used by local children for racing sand yachts, but their fun may be at an end when the army plan to use the dunes as a training ground. The youngsters rally the local community to save their beach, but the discovery of disused mines complicates things further. Family drama, starring Richard Adam and Fiona Davie

programme.title: IBA Unlicensed Legends
programme.desc: Big characters. Great fights. Never seen before amazing action from the ring. Bouts from IBA Boxing's most notorious fighters bring their best game for these high-octane events

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: Shaw Somers, Lucy Jones and Dr Giovanni Miletto give advice to a 42-year-old woman who has been eliminating entire food groups from her diet in an effort to combat her traumatising fish odour syndrome. They also help a teenager who worries severe eczema will prevent him fulfilling his dream of becoming an aeroplane cabin crew member. Three hard-drinking students from Leeds put hangover cures to the test, and Dr Pixie McKenna investigates the veracity of health claims made on food packaging

programme.title: Doctor in the House (1954)
programme.desc: A medical student is taken under the wing of three roguish colleagues who lead him astray into a series of pranks and amorous escapades that succeed in infuriating the dictatorial chief surgeon. Comedy based on the novel by Richard Gordon, starring Dirk Bogarde, Kenneth More, James Robertson Justice and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Hot Enough for June (1964)
programme.desc: An unemployed writer gets a job for an industrialist and is sent on a business trip to Prague. However, he does not realise his boss is actually in the British Secret Service and is using him to unwittingly carry out an important mission - while his local chauffeur is really a Communist agent. Spy comedy, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylva Koscina, Robert Morley, Leo McKern and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring Fitzrovia for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay
